field_values.action_summary: Following the audience, Carter realizes that Sarkoja has been spying on him and reporting his words to Ptomel. The realization of her betrayal, combined with the fear of what Tal Hajus will do to Dejah Thoris, hardens Carter's resolve to escape at any cost.
field_values.emotional_beat: From suspicion to clarity and intense determination.
field_values.camera_intent: Tight close-ups on eyes/face for internal realization; Wide shots of Tharkian environment for isolation/surveillance
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Carter's movement through the city streets
Time of day consistency during transition from chamber to street
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH012_SC002

## Production Intent
Establish the realization of Sarkoja's betrayal and the subsequent hardening of Carter's resolve to escape. The scene must visually communicate the shift from internal suspicion to a concrete, driven determination through tight facial work and isolating wide shots of the Tharkian environment.

## Required Cast
- john_carter (Internal Monologue/Reaction)

## Required Environments
- thark_audience_chamber
- thark_city_streets

## Continuity Constraints
- Carter's movement through the city streets
- Time of day consistency during transition from chamber to street

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter exits the audience chamber after Ptomel's confrontation.
- BT002: The realization of Sarkoja's spying and betrayal.
- BT003: Hardening of resolve to escape and save Dejah Thoris.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
